questions_asked.question: Could you tell me about your current role and what motivated you to apply for this position?
questions_asked.candidate_answer_summary: Said currently in Genesys after developer, but provided minimal detail and did not expand further.

strengths: Briefly identified their current company or technology area
areas_of_concern: Did not elaborate on current responsibilities
Did not share motivation for applying
hiring_manager_summary: Sam provided minimal information about their current role and gave no details on motivation for the new position. Follow-up attempts did not yield additional insights. Insufficient engagement and information to progress further at this stage.
next_steps: No further interviews recommended unless candidate requests reconsideration or clarification.
